creator: boris.hollas@gmx.de
text:
The current sml-mode conflicts with Emacs 22.

Fix: 

The latest Emacs mode for SML can be found at

http://www.iro.umontreal.ca/~monnier/elisp/sml-mode.tar.gz

It works with emacs-22. 

I suggest to remove any explicit dependency on a particular Emacs version to avoid problems with different Emacs versions.
How-To-Repeat: /home/boris# pkg_add -r sml-mode
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-7.2-release/Latest/sml-mode.tbz... Done.
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-7.2-release/All/emacs-21.3_11.tbz... Done.
pkg_add: package 'emacs-21.3_11' conflicts with emacs-22.3
pkg_add: please use pkg_delete first to remove conflicting package(s) or -f to force installation
pkg_add: pkg_add of dependency 'emacs-21.3_11' failed!
